title: Anthurium digitatum
taxonomy: Anthurium digitatum is classified under the family Arum, commonly known as the Arum family. This plant belongs to the order Alismatales, which is a group of flowering plants. Anthurium digitatum is also categorized under the genus Anthurium, which comprises over 1,000 species of flowering plants. The genus Anthurium is further divided into several species, with Anthurium digitatum being one of the unique species within this group. The classification of Anthurium digitatum is significant for its identification and distinction from other plant species.
